name: Anthropic
description: First-party API for Claude models.

name: OpenAI
description: First-party API for GPT and o-series models.

name: Google AI Studio
description: Google's first-party Gemini API for developers.

name: OpenRouter
description: Unified API that aggregates models from many providers behind a single endpoint.

name: Azure OpenAI
description: Microsoft Azure's hosted OpenAI service with enterprise compliance and regional deployments.

name: Google Cloud Vertex AI
description: Google Cloud's enterprise platform for Gemini and partner models.

name: Amazon Bedrock
description: AWS's managed service for foundation models from Anthropic, Meta, Mistral, and others.

name: GitHub Models
description: GitHub's inference endpoint exposing models from multiple providers under one API.

name: Groq
description: Ultra-low-latency inference on custom LPU hardware, hosting open-weight models.

name: Together AI
description: Inference platform for open-weight models with fine-tuning and dedicated endpoints.

name: Fireworks AI
description: Fast inference platform for open-weight models with serverless and dedicated deployments.

name: Cerebras Inference
description: Wafer-scale inference platform delivering very high tokens-per-second for open-weight models.

name: DeepInfra
description: Pay-per-token inference platform for a wide catalog of open-weight models.

name: Replicate
description: Cloud platform for running open-source models on demand via API.

name: SambaNova Cloud
description: High-throughput inference on custom reconfigurable dataflow hardware.

name: NVIDIA NIM
description: NVIDIA's hosted inference microservices for open-weight and partner models.

name: Hugging Face
description: Hugging Face Inference Endpoints and Serverless Inference for open-weight models.

name: Mistral
description: Mistral AI's first-party La Plateforme API for Mistral models.

name: DeepSeek
description: DeepSeek's first-party API for DeepSeek models.

name: xAI
description: xAI's first-party API for Grok models.

name: Cohere
description: Cohere's first-party API for Command-series models.

name: Perplexity
description: Perplexity's first-party API for Sonar models with built-in web grounding.

name: Self-hosted
description: You run the inference yourself, on your own hardware or rented infrastructure. Specify the inference engine in the `framework` field.

name: Other
description: Use this if the inference provider isn't in the list yet. Please open a PR to add it.
